query:
SELECT 
  sp.id, sp.name, sp.investmentAmount, sp.cashBalance, sp.portfolioData,
  pt.ticker, pt.shares, pt.pricePerShare, pt.currency, pt.fxRate, pt.totalAmount, pt.totalAmountCHF, pt.transactionType
FROM savedPortfolios sp
LEFT JOIN portfolioTransactions pt ON sp.id = pt.portfolioId
WHERE sp.name LIKE '%Marc%'
ORDER BY sp.id, pt.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT 
  sp.id, sp.name, sp.investmentAmount, sp.cashBalance, sp.portfolioData,
  pt.ticker, pt.shares, pt.pricePerShare, pt.currency, pt.fxRate, pt.totalAmount, pt.totalAmountCHF, pt.transactionType
FROM savedPortfolios sp
LEFT JOIN portfolioTransactions pt ON sp.id = pt.portfolioId
WHERE sp.name LIKE '%Marc%'
ORDER BY sp.id, pt.id;
